```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr;gap:1.2em;align-items:center;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;">
   <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;padding:0.45em 0.9em;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(86,84,162,0.25);">
    ~/skills/
   </div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.7em;">↘ ↓ ↙</div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.4em;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;">
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#2C3E50;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px solid #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;">Claude</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#2C3E50;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px solid #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;">Codex</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#2C3E50;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px solid #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;">OpenClaw</div>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">multiple agents?</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    Each looks in a <strong style="color:#5654A2;">different folder</strong>.
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <a href="https://github.com/runkids/skillshare" style="color:#5654A2;text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;">skillshare</a> maintains one source &amp; links into each.
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);padding:0.25em 0.6em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;display:inline-block;">
    one source · multiple agents
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
